channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Lagos Residents Protest Over Persistent Power Outages Amid Gas Supply Issues
item.description: On March 12, youths for Lagos carry body come street to protest bad electricity supply wey don dey affect residents and businesses for long time. Dem dey shout 'we no dey ask for too much, give us lig...

item.title: Impact of Middle East Conflicts on Muslim and Arab Students in U.S. Schools
item.description: The ongoing conflicts in the Middle East, including U.S. military actions in Iran and Lebanon, have raised concerns about increased discrimination against Muslim and Arab communities in the United Sta...

item.title: 'Buffy the Vampire Slayer' Reboot Canceled, Says Sarah Michelle Gellar
item.description: Sarah Michelle Gellar has confirmed that the planned reboot of 'Buffy the Vampire Slayer,' titled 'Buffy the Vampire Slayer: New Sunnydale,' has been canceled. The series, which was set to air on Hulu...

item.title: Gul Plaza Fire: Management Negligence Led to Fatalities, Says Fire Chief
item.description: KARACHI: The Chief Fire Officer, Muhammad Humayun Khan, has held the Gul Plaza administration responsible for the tragic loss of life in the January 17 fire. According to Mr Khan, critical fire safety...

item.title: Marcos administration assures support for local governments at 2026 LMP assembly
item.description: The Marcos administration has restated its commitment to supporting local government units (LGUs) during the 2026 general assembly of the League of Municipalities of the Philippines (LMP) held in Pasa...

item.title: Funeral of Late COPE Leader Mosioua Lekota Held in Bloemfontein
item.description: The funeral of the late Mosioua Lekota, former leader of the Congress of the People (COPE), took place on Saturday, 14 March 2026, in Bloemfontein. Lekota, a significant figure in South African politi...

item.title: ATC Extends Interim Bail for PTI Leaders and Relatives in Various Cases
item.description: LAHORE: On Friday, the Anti-Terrorism Court (ATC) in Pakistan extended the interim pre-arrest bail for several leaders and relatives of former Prime Minister and PTI founding chairman Imran Khan, who ...

item.title: Fatal head-on collision near Lake Wivenhoe leaves one dead and two in hospital
item.description: A tragic head-on collision occurred near Lake Wivenhoe, north-west of Brisbane, late on Saturday night, resulting in the death of a young woman and serious injuries to two others. Police believe the c...

item.title: President Ramaphosa Authorises SANDF Deployment to Assist Police Against Crime and Illegal Mining
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa has authorised the deployment of 2,200 members of the South African National Defence Force (SANDF) to assist the South African Police Service (SAPS) in combating crime across...

item.title: Duke and Duchess of Sussex criticise new biography by Tom Bower as conspiratorial
item.description: The Duke and Duchess of Sussex, Prince Harry and Meghan, have strongly criticised royal biographer Tom Bower, describing his forthcoming book as filled with 'deranged conspiracy and melodrama'. In ext...

item.title: ABS-CBN Word of the Day: The Meaning and Usage of 'Gyud' in Cebuano
item.description: On March 15, 2026, ABS-CBN Lifestyle featured 'gyud' as its Word of the Day. This is a popular term from Cebuano or Bisaya, one of the major languages in the Philippines, especially in the Visayas and...

item.title: Escalation in Iran-Israel Conflict: U.S. Evacuates Non-Essential Personnel from Oman, Strikes Intensify
item.description: The ongoing Iran-Israel conflict continues to escalate in West Asia, with no immediate end in sight as of March 15, 2026. U.S. President Donald Trump has threatened additional strikes on Iran’s Kharg ...

item.title: Iran warns of broader regional attacks as Trump urges international naval support to reopen Strait of Hormuz following US strikes on Kharg Island
item.description: The ongoing US-Israeli military offensive against Iran, now in its third week, has intensified with US airstrikes targeting military facilities on Kharg Island, Iran's primary oil export hub. Presiden...

item.title: The ongoing impact of the Christchurch attack and Australia’s role in confronting Islamophobia
item.description: The Christchurch mosque shootings in New Zealand on 15 March 2019, perpetrated by an Australian, continue to echo through legal cases and discussions in Australia. Young offenders in South Australia h...

item.title: Northern Ontario woman passes away unexpectedly during vacation in the Dominican Republic
item.description: A woman from Northern Ontario tragically died while on vacation in the Dominican Republic. The sudden nature of her passing has shocked her family and community back home. Local authorities in the Dom...

item.title: Lindokuhle Mathebula Keeps Sekhukhune United at Bay in Goalless Limpopo Derby
item.description: The Limpopo derby between Polokwane City and Sekhukhune United ended in a 0-0 stalemate, much to the frustration of Sekhukhune United coach Eric Tinkler. The first half was largely uneventful, but the...

item.title: Harambee Stars Squad Announced with Vyner and Obiero for March FIFA Friendlies
item.description: Harambee Stars head coach Benni McCarthy has named a 23-man squad for the upcoming FIFA Series friendlies in Kigali, Rwanda, from March 23 to 31, 2026. The team features a mix of experienced overseas ...

item.title: Telangana Police Report 100 Stray Dogs Killed by Poisoning
item.description: According to the available information, the Telangana police have reported that approximately 100 stray dogs were found dead due to poisoning in the state. The incident has raised concern among animal...

item.title: Comelec Announces Results of Antipolo Second District Special Election
item.description: Voters in Antipolo City participated in a special election on Saturday to choose a new congressman for the second district, following the passing of Rep. Romeo Acop last December. Comelec Chair George...

item.title: Teaching Students Critical Thinking Through Difficult Current Events in K-12 Education
item.description: K-12 classrooms across the United States often encounter spontaneous discussions about challenging topics, such as the Iran war, that teachers may feel unprepared to manage. Many educators, acting in ...
